seoDescription: From concept to commissioning, GenFix handles design, procurement, installation, and support.

hero.heading: Turnkey Power Delivery
hero.body: GenFix delivers turnkey power projects from engineering and procurement through commissioning, handover, and operational support.

sections.title: Complete Project Scope
sections.body: Turnkey solutions are structured so one coordinated team is accountable for delivery quality, sequencing, and site readiness.

cards.title: Design And Engineering
cards.description: Technical scope is defined around real load requirements, constraints, and compliance obligations.

cards.title: Procurement And Logistics
cards.description: Equipment sourcing and transport are sequenced to support installation windows and project deadlines.

cards.title: Installation And Commissioning
cards.description: Structured setup, verification, and documented handover ensure safe, stable operation.

sections.title: Turnkey Delivery Model
sections.body: Our delivery model reduces project friction by linking engineering, field execution, and aftercare in one workflow.

cards.title: Single Point Accountability
cards.description: One accountable GenFix team coordinates design decisions, site execution, and issue resolution.

cards.title: Structured Handover
cards.description: Commissioning records and practical operator guidance improve operational confidence at go-live.

cards.title: Ongoing Performance Support
cards.description: Post-commission service planning helps maintain reliability after project completion.
